summary: Enterprise RBAC: platform roles, tenant-scoped roles, inheritance, and permission labels used for governance reviews.

platform_roles.description: Full platform configuration; must be extremely rare and MFA-gated.
Read-only operational dashboards without tenant secret material.

tenant_scoped_roles.description: Commercial and policy ownership for a single tenant.
Day-2 configuration for integrations, webhooks, and non-production environments.
Deploy, rotate keys in non-prod, trigger exports where policy allows.
Read compliance summaries and evidence exports for audits.
Subscription and invoice visibility; no deployment rights.
